personalInfo.name: Paul Andrie Vicente
personalInfo.headline: BSIT Graduate | IT Support | Technical Support

professionalSummary: Organized BSIT graduate with hands-on internship experience at TESDA in technical support, IT asset inventory, documentation, and basic networking. Proficient in Microsoft Office, Microsoft Excel, Canva, and Adobe tools, with strong organizational and problem-solving skills.

workExperience.organization: Technical Education and Skills Development Authority (TESDA)
highlights: Assisted in monitoring and organizing IT equipment and office assets, ensuring accurate records of available devices and peripherals.
Updated inventory logs and maintained documentation for computer equipment, accessories, and other IT resources using Microsoft Excel.
Supported the receiving, inspection, labeling, and storage of IT equipment and supplies.
Performed routine inventory checks to verify asset availability and report missing, damaged, or non-functional equipment.
Maintained organized records and documentation to support efficient asset tracking and inventory management.
Collaborated with supervisors and team members to ensure accurate inventory records and smooth daily operations.

technical.title: Graphic Design
items: Social media poster design and digital layout creation
Application of typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy

projects.name: Gym QR Attendance System
highlights: Built a QR-based attendance system for gym member check-ins and hours tracking using AI-powered development tools.

projects.name: TheUndergrads Ordering System
highlights: Built an ordering and inventory management system using AI-powered development tools.
Implemented order processing, inventory tracking, and user-friendly interfaces.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (BSIT)

education.school: Mayon Institute of Science and Technology

paragraphs: As a BSIT graduate with hands-on internship experience at TESDA, I am excited to apply my technical knowledge and organizational skills to an entry-level position within your company.

During my internship, I gained practical experience in IT asset inventory, documentation, Microsoft Excel, hardware and software support, and basic networking. I also assisted in maintaining inventory records, tracking IT assets, and supporting daily office operations.

In addition to my technical background, I am proficient in Microsoft Office, Microsoft Excel, Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, and Figma. I am confident that my skills and willingness to learn will allow me to contribute effectively to your team.
Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your organization.
